description: 制造业行业扩展 ontology，覆盖工厂运营、生产管理、供应链、质量控制、设备维护和智能制造
description_en: Manufacturing industry extension covering factory operations, production management, supply chain, quality control, equipment maintenance, and smart manufacturing

classes.definition: 从事产品生产制造的实体单位，含一个或多个车间和产线
classes.definition_en: A physical entity engaged in product manufacturing, comprising one or more workshops and production lines

classes.definition: 工厂内按工艺或产品划分的生产区域
classes.definition_en: A production area within a factory organized by process or product type

classes.definition: 按工序连续排列的设备和工位组合，完成特定产品的批量生产
classes.definition_en: A sequence of equipment and workstations arranged for mass production of a specific product

classes.definition: 存储原材料、在制品和成品的物理空间
classes.definition_en: Physical storage for raw materials, work-in-progress, and finished goods

classes.definition: 工厂生产的最终产品或半成品
classes.definition_en: Finished or semi-finished goods produced by a factory

classes.definition: 用于生产制造的输入物料，含金属、化工原料、电子元器件等
classes.definition_en: Input materials for manufacturing, including metals, chemicals, electronic components

classes.definition: 产品所需全部零部件和原材料的结构化清单
classes.definition_en: Structured list of all components and raw materials required for a product

classes.definition: 指示生产特定数量产品的制造指令
classes.definition_en: A manufacturing instruction to produce a specific quantity of a product

classes.definition: 产品或工序的质量检验结果记录
classes.definition_en: Record of quality inspection results for a product or process

classes.definition: 用于加工、装配、检测的机械设备和工装夹具
classes.definition_en: Machinery, tooling, and fixtures used for processing, assembly, and inspection

classes.definition: 设备预防性维护或故障维修的工作指令
classes.definition_en: Work instruction for preventive maintenance or corrective repair of equipment

classes.definition: 向工厂提供原材料、零部件或服务的外部企业
classes.definition_en: External enterprise supplying raw materials, components, or services to a factory

classes.definition: 负责编制和调整生产计划、排程排产的角色
classes.definition_en: A role responsible for creating and adjusting production plans and scheduling

classes.definition: 执行来料检验、过程检验和成品检验的质量控制角色
classes.definition_en: A quality control role performing incoming, in-process, and final inspections

classes.definition: 负责设备维护、故障排除和修复的技术角色
classes.definition_en: A technical role responsible for equipment maintenance, troubleshooting, and repair

classes.definition: 企业质量管理体系的总纲政策，通常基于 ISO 9001
classes.definition_en: Top-level quality management system policy, typically based on ISO 9001

classes.definition: 产品质量缺陷导致返工、退货或召回的风险
classes.definition_en: Risk of product defects leading to rework, returns, or recalls

classes.definition: 因供应商、物流或地缘政治因素导致原材料供应中断的风险
classes.definition_en: Risk of raw material supply interruption due to supplier, logistics, or geopolitical factors

classes.definition: 从需求预测、主生产计划到排程排产的端到端计划流程
classes.definition_en: End-to-end planning from demand forecast, master production schedule to detailed scheduling

classes.definition: 从来料检验、过程控制到出厂检验的全链路质量管控流程
classes.definition_en: Full-chain quality management from incoming inspection, in-process control to final inspection

classes.definition: 预防性维护、预测性维护和故障维修的管理流程
classes.definition_en: Management process for preventive, predictive, and corrective maintenance

classes.definition: 消除浪费、持续改善、实现高效生产的组织能力
classes.definition_en: Organizational capability to eliminate waste, continuously improve, and achieve efficient production

classes.definition: 管理和监控车间层面生产执行的信息系统
classes.definition_en: Information system managing and monitoring shop-floor production execution

classes.definition: 实时采集设备数据并进行过程监控的工业控制系统
classes.definition_en: Industrial control system for real-time equipment data acquisition and process monitoring

classes.definition: 设备可用率 × 性能率 × 良品率，衡量设备产出效率
classes.definition_en: Availability × Performance × Quality — measures equipment output efficiency

classes.definition: 合格品数量占总产出数量的比率
classes.definition_en: Ratio of conforming units to total units produced

classes.definition: 一定期间内库存被消耗和补充的次数，衡量库存管理效率
classes.definition_en: Number of times inventory is consumed and replenished in a period, measuring inventory management efficiency

relations.definition_en: A production line produces a manufactured product
A product is defined by a bill of materials
A work order consumes raw materials
A product is inspected and documented in a quality inspection report

relations.definition: 设备通过维保工单维护
relations.definition_en: Equipment is maintained through maintenance orders
A supplier provides materials to a factory

relations.definition: 工单由生产计划流程排程
relations.definition_en: A work order is scheduled by the production planning process

relations.definition: 产线由 MES 系统监控
relations.definition_en: A production line is monitored by the MES system

relations.definition: 设备由 SCADA 系统采集数据和监控
relations.definition_en: Equipment data is collected and monitored by the SCADA system
